statement: In every magma, Equation 2516 (`x = (y * ((x * z) * x)) * w`) implies Equation 3360 (`x * y = y * (y * (z * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0401
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op x z) x)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op y (op y (op z z)))
